description_long: This modern bungalow features a combination of wood and white exterior finishes, with a prominent gable roof and several skylights. The structure is L-shaped, enclosing a spacious outdoor deck area that includes a rectangular swimming pool with two floating loungers. Adjacent to the pool, there is a shaded lounge area with outdoor furniture and a hot tub, all surrounded by a wooden privacy fence. Large glass doors and windows provide ample natural light and connect the indoor and outdoor living spaces. The building's clean lines and minimalistic design are complemented by the use of natural materials and a neutral color palette. The overall layout emphasizes open, functional living with a strong connection to the outdoor environment.
description: A modern L-shaped bungalow with wood and white finishes, featuring a gable roof, skylights, a large deck, pool, and outdoor lounge area.
description_view_0: Front and side of the bungalow with visible gable roof, large glass doors, pool, and deck area with loungers.
description_view_1: Side view showing the length of the deck, pool, and shaded lounge area, with windows and doors along the building.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the gable roof, wood siding, and the enclosed deck area extending from the main structure.
description_view_3: Back view showing the full width of the bungalow, the pool, and the outdoor lounge area within the fenced deck.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped side and rear windows
